_meta.review_warning: AI-drafted v0. DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION until reviewed by a qualified Vic WHS practitioner and approved. Tree work above 2m or near power lines requires a qualified arborist with the relevant tickets. Significant tree removal often requires planning permission and / or arboricultural impact assessment.

activity_name: Tree removal and pruning (in-house — small trees / ground-level work)

hazards.title: Chainsaw cut / kickback
hazards.risk: Serious laceration from chainsaw kickback or contact

controls.title: Chainsaw operated only by trained / ticketed person
Pre-use check: chain tension, sharpness, brake, throttle interlock, anti-vibration mounts
Forestry helmet with visor + ear muffs

hazards.title: Falling limb struck-by
hazards.risk: Cut limb striking worker, plant, or property

controls.title: Drop zone planned; cleared and signalled before each cut
Exclusion zone 2× tree height; spotter at perimeter

hazards.title: Contact with overhead power lines
hazards.risk: Branches contacting overhead lines; saw / pole pruner contacting lines

controls.title: Trees within ESV exclusion of overhead lines: STOP — engage qualified arborist (EWP-certified, line-clearance trained)
Electrical spotter where in any doubt
NEVER operate chainsaw from a ladder
Work > 2m AGL: use EWP or engage qualified arborist

hazards.title: Chipper entanglement
hazards.risk: Worker drawn into chipper feed rollers

controls.title: Chipper operated by trained person; never feed alone for large material
No gloves with cuffs, no loose clothing, no scarves / lanyards near feed
Emergency stop bar functional and within reach

ppe.title: Forestry helmet with visor + ear muffs

tasks: Pre-start: confirm tree assessment, planning permission if required, no overhead power conflict.
Confirm in-house scope: tree small enough for ground-level felling + manual removal. Otherwise engage qualified arborist.
Toolbox: walk plan with crew; identify drop zone, exclusion zone, signaller position.
Set up exclusion zone (2× tree height); signage; spotter at perimeter.
Chainsaw pre-use check; refuel away from cut area; no smoking around fuel.
Fell using planned hinge cut; retreat path clear.
Limb / buck on the ground; never from a ladder.
Feed chipper progressively; no loose clothing; never reach into feed.
Stump grinding (if separate task): exclusion zone; eye protection (debris); P2 mask.
Remove waste to mulch / green-waste; site clean.
